description: Two scientific conclusion candidates for rubric evaluation demo. One strong (well-supported perovskite solar cell finding), one weak (unsupported claim with no evidence).

candidates.content: The perovskite solar cell achieved a power conversion efficiency of 25.6% under standard AM1.5G illumination conditions, representing a significant improvement over the 23.1% baseline.
candidates.provenance_quote: Under standard AM1.5G illumination, the champion device demonstrated a stabilized power conversion efficiency of 25.6 +/- 0.3%, a marked improvement from the 23.1% efficiency of the unmodified control device.

candidates.content: The material shows promising energy properties.
